releaseNotesMarkdown:
Comparing against published beta build beta-2026.0427.0904
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

- Titlebar buttons send SC_CLOSE/SC_MINIMIZE + system menu on right-click
- Titlebar buttons direct DestroyWindow/ShowWindow + 44px height
- WM_NCCALCSIZE handler claims full client area + 56px title bar
- Drop WM_NCCALCSIZE handler — it broke the chrome strip
- Paint min/close buttons inline in title-bar Frame
- Invalidate title_label when Frame repaints — preserves brand text
- Bigger title-bar caption + drop redundant amber separator
- Close button posts WM_QUIT so the process actually exits
- Bigger title caption + subtler chrome divider
- Size_absolute caption font + anchor buttons to Frame.right
- Size title-bar to actual client width + Win11 button polish
- Forge-flavored polish pass — progress bar, warning banner, dividers
- In-dialog release notes + harden CI verify step
- Copy polish — RTM not Microsoft, drop chatty interjections
- Section accent bars + themed combobox subclass

### Forge Tools improvements

- Patrol(slagbeard-creator): register LOREMASTER achievement so toast action button unlocks work
- Patrol(steelward): log CreateExternalCommandDataShim outer catch with Diagnostics.Log
- Patrol(ironhelm): wrap SeedDefaults in try-catch so all 6 built-in commands attempt registration even if one throws
- Forge(plumbersmith-creator): add LevelUpFanfareEngine — contextual milestone celebrations (Bronze→Mythic tiers)
- Patrol(custodian): add Dispose() to WayfinderTipEngine and wire into RTMRunHelper.Dispose()
- Patrol(swiftblade): add WhereElementIsNotElementType to ChangeSystemTypeCommand FEC chain
- Forge(arcadesmith-creator): harden arcade game infrastructure - ArcadeGameBase OnClosing cleanup, long-safe score persist, complete input reset
- Patrol(cinderbloom): add OnClosed event unsubscription for IsVisibleChanged and Loaded in CheckListWindow
- Patrol(embersong): add WhereElementIsNotElementType quick filter to 4 collectors in PinForge and DuplicateForge
- Forge(luxesmith-creator): add LuxeSearchBar component to RTMTools design system
- Patrol(emberveil): applied ForgeTextBoxStyle/StandardComboBoxStyle to SpatialForgeWindow unstyled inputs
- Patrol(flameveil): added AutomationProperties.Name binding to BulkUpdateAction button at line 602

_(+ 12 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
